title: White House eVTOL Integration Pilot Program ACHR Selection
text: US Department of Transportation and Federal Aviation Administration announced Archer's partners in Texas, Florida and New York selected for White House's eVTOL Integration Pilot Program (eIPP). Archer working directly with partners in those states to begin laying groundwork for early Midnight operations in those states as soon as second half of 2026. Established via President Trump's Unleashing Drone Dominance Executive Order, eIPP designed to accelerate adoption of electric air taxis in major cities across country by creating operational pathways for top American eVTOL companies. Archer's applications to eIPP are proposed public-private partnerships with cities across California, Texas, Florida, Georgia and New York. Bid with Huntington Beach supports Archer's plans for early air taxi operations in and around Los Angeles as part of role as Official Air Taxi Provider of 2028 Olympic Games. Partnership represents significant regulatory and political support for Archer's commercialization timeline.
